name: I got hit by falling debris—should I hire a lawyer before talking to insurance?
description: Yes. Falling object cases often involve high-value third-party claims. A lawyer preserves evidence of safety violations and prevents you from settling for less

mainEntity.name: I got hit by falling debris—should I hire a lawyer before talking to insurance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Falling object cases often involve high-value third-party claims. A lawyer preserves evidence of safety violations and prevents you from settling for less than your case is worth.
